overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval fantasy game showing a character in a blue dress exploring the interior of a stone castle. The character moves through torch-lit chambers and narrow corridors, transitioning from a window-lit round tower room through winding passages to a storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: round stone tower chamber with arched window

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the stone chamber toward a doorway, passing wooden barrels

entered.detail: curved stone wall of the tower interior with rough masonry texture
tall narrow window with bright daylight streaming through
stone steps ascending along the curved wall
lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm light
stack of wooden barrels against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a round stone tower chamber illuminated by mixed natural light from an arched window and a wall torch. Wooden barrels sit against the curved stone wall as the character walks toward a doorway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with torch lighting

events.description: character passes through stone doorway from the lit tower chamber into a darker narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone doorway into the torch-lit corridor

entered.detail: arched stone doorway marking the transition between rooms
lit torch mounted on the corridor wall ahead
thick wooden beam supporting the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the tower chamber into a narrow stone corridor illuminated by a single wall torch. The space is enclosed with rough stone walls and a wooden support post visible as the character moves deeper into the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved castle corridor with wooden ceiling beams

events.description: lighting shifts from torch illumination to darker shadows as the corridor curves

agents.ego_description: following the curved path of the corridor along the stone wall

entered.detail: smooth curved stone wall following the corridor's bend
exposed heavy wooden beams supporting the corridor ceiling
red cloth banner hanging on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved corridor with exposed wooden ceiling beams overhead. A red fabric banner hangs on the stone wall to the left as the corridor bends, with the torch light falling behind and to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle storage room with supplies and furniture

events.description: character approaches doorway covered with hanging cloth curtain
character enters storage room revealing wooden shelves and lit lantern

agents.ego_description: approaching the curtained doorway and entering the storage room with shelves

entered.detail: heavy beige cloth covering the doorway entrance
tall wooden shelves stacked with boxes and supplies
lit lantern providing warm light over the storage area
closed wooden chest on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a doorway covered by a heavy cloth curtain and enters a small storage room. Inside, wooden shelves line the walls filled with supplies, illuminated by a hanging lantern. A wooden chest sits on the stone floor as the character explores the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, round tower chamber through a series of dim stone passages into a cluttered storage room. It begins in the tower room where natural light from an arched window mixes with torchlight, following the character past wooden barrels toward a distant doorway. As the character exits the chamber, the space tightens into a narrow stone corridor illuminated by a single wall torch and supported by heavy wooden posts. The scene then shifts as the corridor curves under exposed ceiling beams, passing a red fabric banner on the wall before turning toward a heavy cloth curtain. Finally, the camera pushes through the curtain into a small storage room, where the lighting changes to the glow of a hanging lantern illuminating wooden shelves and a chest on the stone floor.
